title: What happened between Benny Johnson and Marjorie Taylor Greene? YouTuber faces grifting accusations during Thomas Massie controversy
summary_full: Benny Johnson and Marjorie Taylor Greene became involved in a major online feud after Greene criticized Johnson’s YouTube coverage of hush-money allegations against Thomas Massie. The fight quickly turned personal, with both accusing each other of dishonesty and propaganda. Meanwhile, Massie strongly denied the accusations, calling them false and politically motivated just before his Kentucky primary election.
